title: 9 Herbal Tinctures For Snoring
description: Valeriana officinalis tinctures contains valerenic acid, isovaleric acid, and valeranone, which are known to help with snoring. These constituents have a sedative effect on the nervous system, promoting relaxation and reducing stress levels, which can contribute to snoring. The valerenic acid in Valeriana officinalis tinctures has a calming effect on the muscles in the throat, helping to keep them from constricting and causing snoring.
